LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SAGONOWSKY'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS DENIED. SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WAS EFFECTUATED PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 415.20. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

OBJECTION TO AND OPPOSITION TO STRIKE OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS FILED BY DEFENDANT SAGONOWSKY, CHRISTINA

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SAGONOWSKY'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 5, 2014. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE COUNSEL WITH A COPY OF THE OPPOSITION BY JANUARY 24, 2014 AT 4 PM. DEFENDANT MAY FILE A SUBSTANTIVE REPLY BRIEF UP TO FIVE COURT DAYS BEFORE THE NEW HEARING DATE, PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 1005(B). JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR5976

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SAGONOWSKY's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is Denied. Substitute service was effectuated pursuant to CCP sec. 415.20. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Jan-23-2014 Continued To Feb-05-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ROBERT COHEN, ESQ., 800.492.2657, FOR PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SAGONOWSKY's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is continued to February 5, 2014. Plaintiff shall serve counsel with a copy of the opposition by January 24, 2014 at 4 pm. Defendant may file a substantive reply brief up to five court days before the new hearing date, pursuant to CCP sec. 1005(b). Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
